title: com.para.highlight.defs
summary: Indexed highlight annotation views for public and private political reading layers.
relationships: Backs list and detail highlight queries.
constraints: `highlightView` requires subjectUri, text, range start/end, color, visibility, and createdAt.
lifecycle: Highlight records are indexed into a view shape that can be filtered by subject, creator, community, or state.
writers: Backend indexing pipeline writes highlight views from highlight annotations.
indexing: Indexes subject linkage, text span offsets, and visibility state for browseable highlight views.
moderation: Visibility and subject context determine whether a highlight is publicly readable or only personal.

fields.name: start / end
fields.description: Range offsets locating the highlight inside the subject.

fields.name: visibility
fields.description: Whether the highlight participates in public reading layers.
